CustomField.formula: IF(INCLUDES(Existing_Agreements__c,"Temp Nursing Agreement"),"Temp Nursing Agreement;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(Existing_Agreements__c,"Temp Therapy Agreement"),"Temp Therapy Agreement;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(Existing_Agreements__c,"Perm Nursing Agreement"),"Perm Nursing Agreement;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(Existing_Agreements__c,"Perm Therapy Agreement"),"Perm Therapy Agreement;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(Existing_Agreements__c,"Perm Physician Agreement"),"Perm Physician Agreement;",null)
CustomField.label: Existing Agreements (Text)
